data.name: Authenticate
data.description: Validates user credentials against the user accounts database.

data.name: Authorize
data.description: Checks user roles and permissions; logs the login event.

data.name: Login Processing
data.description: Issues session token and returns authenticated page/response to the user.

data.name: User Accounts DB
data.description: Stores user credentials and account information.

data.name: Audit / Session Log
data.description: Records login events and active session tokens.

data.name: Login credentials
data.description: Username and password (or token) submitted by the user.

data.name: Identity / Account info
data.description: Authenticate queries the accounts DB with user identity; DB returns account data.

data.name: Identity
data.description: Verified identity passed from Authenticate to Authorize.

data.name: Login event / Rights
data.description: Authorize writes login event to log and reads back user rights/roles.

data.name: Identity request / confirm
data.description: Authorize passes identity request to Login Processing; Login Processing confirms.

data.name: Session / Page
data.description: Login Processing returns a session token and redirects the user to the home page.
